description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.0.0 Docker image. Define a pages job that runs in the deploy stage to build and publish a GitLab Pages site. The job runs the exact commands: npm install, npx elm-package install -y, npx gulp build, and mv dist public; it then uploads the public/ directory as a pages artifact. The job is restricted to the master branch only and no additional services or caches are defined.
